title: Photonic Quantum-Accelerated Machine Learning
summary: Second paper using the Boson-Sampling-based quantum reservoir architecture, with a focus on benchmarking and comparing the performance of the quantum reservoir to classical machine learning models on a variety of datasets.

title: Experimental multi-center validation of a radiomics-based photonic quantum precision medicine architecture for lesion-level prediction of anti-PD-1 response in non-small cell lung cancer
summary: Preprint study using MerLin to test the external validity of radiomics-based photonic quantum architectures using an evidence-based, statistically significant reduced feature space
